cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. I need to figure out what the date was a month ago in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe I can work through this step by step. First, I need to determine Jane's birthdate.
